title: California Courts Quietly Test AI Judicial Assistant Without Notifying Litigants
blurb: Judges are using AI to help decide your case. You might never know.

title: YouTube Now Auto-Labels Videos Containing Significant AI-Generated Content
blurb: YouTube can now spot AI-generated video without relying on creators to admit it.

title: Anthropic Commits $15 Billion Annually to SpaceX for Computing Power
blurb: Anthropic's monthly compute bill rivals the GDP of a small nation — and there's an exit clause buried in the fine print.
